data.summary: Experienced AI and Backend Developer with expertise in designing high-throughput REST and GraphQL APIs using Python and FastAPI. Skilled in deploying microservices with Docker and Kubernetes on AWS, and optimizing databases with PostgreSQL and Redis. Proven success in implementing CI/CD processes using GitHub Actions, with a strong focus on observability and scalable systems.

bullets.text: Engineered production-grade microservice platforms using Python and FastAPI, with an emphasis on API design and data modeling for scalable data pipelines, achieving sub-300ms response times.
Enhanced system reliability and observability using Prometheus, Grafana, and CloudWatch, reducing incident response times by 40% and maintaining service uptime at 99.99%.
Developed a full-stack Skills Intelligence Platform (FastAPI, React.js, Azure SQL, Docker) with over 2,000 employees, streamlining talent discovery processes by 60%.
Implemented container-native CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and Jenkins, facilitating zero-downtime deployments and telemetry on Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS).
Created high-throughput Node.js microservices with PostgreSQL, utilizing message queues for sub-100ms response times in analytics dashboards.
Managed a serverless environment using AWS Lambda and API Gateway, optimizing for scale and a 99.9% uptime while reducing infrastructure costs by 30%.

Cloud / DevOps: AWS (EKS, Lambda, S3, RDS, CloudWatch, API Gateway)
